market_summary: S&P 500 at record 7,599.96, ninth consecutive weekly gain driven by AI boom (Dell +33%). Crypto diverged — BTC $72,145 amid record $2.97B ETF outflow streak. US-Iran ceasefire framework uncertain, Brent $92-108/bbl.
key_events_this_week: Wed Jun 4: ADP Employment, ISM Services PMI, Fed Beige Book
Fri Jun 6: Nonfarm Payrolls (May) — marquee event
Jun 16-17: FOMC meeting (97%+ odds hold at 3.50-3.75%)
overnight_risks: KOSPI +3.68% record — Samsung +10% on HBM4E AI chip shipments
US-Iran ceasefire fragile: Iran reimposed Hormuz restrictions
MicroStrategy first-ever BTC sale rattled sentiment
China PMI weak, real estate still cratering

instrument_news.XAG-USD: Silver $75.64 (+0.53%). BofA raised 2026 avg to $85.93. Sixth consecutive supply deficit year. June range $72-$88.
instrument_news.XAU-USD: Gold $4,455-4,535. Central banks buying 755t. Goldman $5,400, JPM $5,500, UBS $6,000+ targets. COT unextended.
instrument_news.BTC-USD: BTC $72,145. Record $2.43B May ETF outflows. MSTR sold 32 BTC. Support $72K, breakdown $68-70K.
instrument_news.ETH-USD: ETH $1,950-$2,430 range. Hidden bullish divergence + whale accumulation. Needs $2,500 then $3,100.
instrument_news.MSTR: MSTR $150 (-6%). First standalone BTC sale. GF Value $118.67 = 25.6% overvalued. Holds ~815-840K BTC.

metals_outlook: Structurally bullish. Central bank buying 755t, silver sixth consecutive deficit year. COT unextended. Binary: FOMC Jun 16-17 could pressure; Hormuz resolution removes safe-haven bid. Goldman/JPM/UBS target $5-6K gold.
oil_outlook: Brent $92-108, elevated from Hormuz closure since Feb 28. 60-day ceasefire uncertain. Key transmission: elevated oil keeping inflation up, preventing Fed cuts. Resolution = deflationary risk-on.
crypto_outlook: Challenging June. Record ETF outflows, oil-inflation preventing Fed easing, MSTR narrative damage. S&P at records while BTC at 2026 lows. Recovery catalysts: Hormuz reopening, NFP miss, ETF flow reversal.
sentiment_shift: Split: extreme risk-on equities (AI boom) but risk-off crypto (record outflows) and cautious commodities. Iran/Hormuz = dominant binary.
